blended.narrative: Lost Trail is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,952 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 8.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 56".
